putrid_strike.name: Putrid Strike
putrid_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A strike focused on spreading rot. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Rot Pip.

festering_wound.name: Festering Wound
festering_wound.description: Setup: Open a wound that refuses to heal. Generates 1 Rot Pip and applies [Bleeding].

toxic_collapse.name: Toxic Collapse
toxic_collapse.description: Payoff: Cause all infections to burst at once. Consumes 5 Rot Pips to deal massive damage vs targets with [Poisoned] or [Toxic].

miasma_explosion.name: Miasma Explosion
miasma_explosion.description: Payoff/AOE: A cloud of lethal miasma. Consumes 3 Rot Pips to deal AOE magic damage and apply [Toxic] for 10 ticks.

carapace_of_decay.name: Carapace of Decay
carapace_of_decay.description: Defense: A shield made of hardened rot. Reduces incoming Physical damage by 60% for 6 ticks.

necrotic_stasis.name: Necrotic Stasis
necrotic_stasis.description: Defense/Disruption: Slow down the target's spiritual flow. Applies [Stalled] for 4 ticks.

sludge_dash.name: Sludge Dash
sludge_dash.description: Mobility: Slide across the ground on a trail of toxic sludge.

plague_of_oblivion.name: Plague of Oblivion
plague_of_oblivion.description: Utility/Signature: For 30 ticks, every enemy you hit becomes a focal point for a toxic explosion, hitting nearby allies of theirs.

defiler_physiology.name: Defiler Physiology
defiler_physiology.description: Passive: Rot Lord. You gain 10% bonus Magic power for every enemy in the room that has a [Toxic] status.
